title: FDA Approves Merck's Welireg-Keytruda Combo as Adjuvant Treatment for Kidney Can
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: FDA approved Merck's combination of Welireg (belzutifan) + Keytruda (pembrolizumab) as adjuvant treatment for kidney cancer. Approval announced June 12, 2026.

title: Jazz Pharma's Zepzelca Fails Confirmatory Phase 3 Lung Cancer Study
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: Zepzelca (lurbinectedin) failed its confirmatory Phase 3 study in lung cancer. Endpoints describes it as "Zepzelca saga takes another turn with ph. 3 lung cancer flop." FiercePharma timestamp: Jun 12, 2026, 10:48am.

title: Enliven Therapeutics Prices $400M Public Offering
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: Enliven Therapeutics priced a $400 million public offering. Reported alongside Zepzelca failure in Endpoints News Briefing (Jun 12).

title: Amgen to File Third-Party Review of Tavneos Data for FDA Hearing
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: Amgen plans to file a third-party review of Tavneos (avacopan) data ahead of an FDA advisory committee hearing. Timestamp: Jun 12, 2026, 11:12am.

title: Novo Nordisk's Oral GLP-1 (Oral Wegovy/Semaglutide) Picks Up UK Approval
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: Novo Nordisk's oral GLP-1 received UK regulatory approval. FiercePharma Regulatory Tracker: Jun 12, 2026, 9:50am. Separate FiercePharma tracker headline: "Novo's Wegovy keeps gaining ground" (Jun 12, 2:30pm).

title: CMS Proposal to Lock in Medicare Drug Price Negotiations
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: CMS proposed a rule that would "lock in" Medicare drug price negotiations. Fierce Healthcare timestamp: Jun 12, 2026, 5:50pm.

title: WuXi AppTec Sues Pentagon Over Chinese Military List Inclusion
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: WuXi AppTec filed a lawsuit against the Pentagon challenging its inclusion on a list of Chinese military-linked companies. Reported 11 hours before Endpoints page fetch.

title: Incyte Agrees to Acquire Vega Therapeutics for $1.25 Billion
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: Incyte agreed to acquire Vega Therapeutics (a subsidiary of Star Therapeutics) for $1.25 billion.
